_readme: Curated local dictionary used by @Intake's lookup_herb tool. Keys are lowercase, underscore-separated common/Ayurvedic names. 'active_compounds' lists the constituent names used as lookup keys into docking_lookup.json.

guggulu.traditional_use: Lipid-lowering and anti-inflammatory resin extract, commonly used in Ayurveda for hyperlipidemia and joint conditions.

yashtimadhu.traditional_use: Demulcent root used for cough, acid reflux, and as a general adaptogen/rasayana.

karela.traditional_use: Traditional anti-diabetic vegetable/juice used to support healthy blood glucose levels.

st_johns_wort.traditional_use: Western herbal supplement widely sold for mood support; included here for its well-documented cross-system interaction profile relevant to Indian transplant patients who may self-medicate with imported supplements.

tulsi.traditional_use: Widely consumed adaptogen/rasayana herb for respiratory and immune support, often taken as tea.
